flags.message: Decisive forward signal from a companion case (pre-snapshot public information, not leakage): cert was granted in the lead case Nielsen v. Watanabe, No. 25-417, on 2026-06-22, and this petition's docket shows the classic hold pattern (distributed 6/11 and 6/18/2026, no order since). The prediction (P=0.85 grant, likeliest disposition GVR) is largely derivative of Nielsen's expected outcome, so this cell's realized disposition will not resolve until Nielsen is decided (~June 2027).
